description: CompositionCream coloured round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, and graphic print and lettering on the front in a mildly distressed lookFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery If karma is what you believe in as the foundation of your existence, then this cream tee from tantra is a great way to broadcast your belief. Team this t-shirt with jeans or shorts the next time you go out with friends and use this as a cheeky reminder to stay good. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
